text.title: On-Call Rotation Setup Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply on-call-rotation-setup. Each step names its input, action, and output. Steps may not be reordered without explicit deviation note.

step.name: Define coverage window
step.description: Input: SLA + service criticality. Action: Document required coverage hours.. Output: Coverage window..
step.note: Step 1. Required input: SLA + service criticality.

step.name: Pick tiers
step.description: Input: Coverage window + team size. Action: Single tier vs primary+secondary.. Output: Tier model..
step.note: Step 2. Required input: Coverage window + team size.

step.name: Generate schedule
step.description: Input: Tier model + headcount. Action: Run schedule generator; load into paging platform.. Output: Live rotation..
step.note: Step 3. Required input: Tier model + headcount.

step.name: Wire compensation
step.description: Input: Tier model. Action: Document comp; sync HR.. Output: Compensated rotation..

step.name: Audit fairness quarterly
step.description: Input: Live rotation. Action: Per-engineer load report; rebalance if outliers.. Output: Audit log..
